body.title: Scrub SQLite language from word_graph docstring
body.result: Shipped in 2aab7616. Module + class docstrings now reflect Postgres (via db_proxy) as the storage; retired the SQLite-backed framing with a note.
body.description:
Pass-2 Area 3 Gap 1 (SHIP). word_graph.py module docstring and class docstring both claim SQLite-backed. Actual code uses PGDatabaseProxy. Per T-docs-live-in-code the docstring is canonical. Fix: rewrite both to say Postgres via db_proxy; drop stale 'Old .json files can be deleted' framing.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/cognition/word_graph.py (docstring only).
**Design rules:** docs-live-in-code, test-plan-or-why-not (no tests because: docstring-only).
**Scope boundary:** IN — module + class docstrings. OUT — any code logic; .db path abstraction (separate ticket).
